original_snippet_context: A discussion about various government initiatives and constructions, including a mention of an "Agencia de Cambio."
relevant_quote: De passagem visitou as obras em construcção destinadas á Agencia de Cambio, Correio e Telegrapho, dependência esta cuja construcção se acha bastante adeantada
justification: This mention refers to the construction of an "Agencia de Cambio" (Exchange Agency).  While related to currency, it doesn't discuss the Caixa de Conversão or its associated monetary policies in the context of the 1906 debates.
